diff:
diff --git a/src/preview.py b/src/preview.py
index 09f54fe..504b1c5 100644
--- a/src/preview.py
+++ b/src/preview.py
@@ -3,4 +3,6 @@ def preview_text(text: str, limit: int) -> str:
         raise ValueError("limit must be non-negative")
     if len(text) <= limit:
         return text
-    return text[:limit] + "..."
+    if limit <= 3:
+        return text[:limit]
+    return text[:limit - 3] + "..."
